assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response configures Saturday maintenance windows using --maintenance-window-start and --maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA" parameters

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Multiple gcloud commands show --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-duration (not end), and --maintenance-window-recurrence with proper weekly Saturday scheduling

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Shows Q1 code freeze exclusion example with 17-day period using --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Provides specific November audit exclusion commands with full month coverage (2024-11-01 to 2024-11-30)

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: While the response mentions manual upgrades in the minor version upgrade process section, it does not explicitly explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response recommends Extended channel for production clusters and explains it provides maximum control while maintaining security posture

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Multiple exclusion commands show proper use of --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time parameters

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, though it mentions tracking end-of-support dates
